title: Oportun Announces CEO Succession Plan
text: Oportun Financial Corporation announced that Chief Executive Officer Raul Vazquez will step down from his roles as CEO and Board member no later than April 3, 2026. He will continue serving as an advisor until July 3, 2026, to facilitate a smooth transition. The Board has initiated a CEO search with a nationally recognized executive search firm. Lead Independent Director Louis P. Miramontes stated: Under Raul's guidance, Oportun completed its initial public offering and evolved from a regional lender into a national financial services company. Vazquez, who has led the company for nearly 14 years, expressed gratitude for the opportunity: It has been an honor to lead Oportun and to work alongside such a talented, dedicated and mission-driven team. The announcement included preliminary 2025 financial results showing Oportun expects to meet or exceed guidance across key metrics, including total revenue of $955-$957 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $146-$148 million for the full year. The company will release complete fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results in mid-February 2026.
